title: Vedi Pottu Lyrics Poraali Porali Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer; Velmurugan, Thanjai Selvi
Song: Vedi Pottu
Movie: Poraali
Lyrics by :Kabilan

Vedi Pottu Paaduda, Adi pottu aaduda
Kudikaama bodha tharren vaada vaa.
Marapaachi ponnuda, kilipechu kannuda
Paavaada raatinatha paarrenda ..

Sandhanam poosi vandha sappathi kalli
Thotta manam veesum thoongaatha malli
Sillara pallu kaari sirichaale pochu
Kanavula iva vandha kankollaa kaachi

Unveedu pillai endru, un sondham pandham endru
onnaa ne moota kattaadhe
Thaayilla pillaikum thaalattu paadiya
annai pol thaangi kollada
Vetta vetta kaaikira vazha maram pola
unna nambi ohngi nillada
Ye rattam katti yeruda
mettu katti kooruda
Patti thotti namma ooruda ... (Vedi Pottu ..)

Kannum rendu kaamathuku kalla chaavida
Enna thotta odipogum aavida
Ullukulla oduradhu ratham illada
Nee uchithandhu pacha kutthum muthamda

Pannaiyaaru thottathuku vaadi, vaadi vaadi
pambarama thudikudhu naadi
ye kokkarako sevaluku kozhi neethaan
Kooda vaangi vachiruke naanthaan

Paadhai unnaku pakkam iruku
vegathoda vaagai sooda vaada vaa..vaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Vedi Pottu'?

'Vedi Pottu' conveys a sense of celebration and joy, encouraging listeners to embrace life with enthusiasm.

What is the context of this song in the movie Poraali?

In Poraali, this song represents a festive moment where characters come together to celebrate, reflecting the film's overall theme of unity and joy.

Who are the singers and music director of 'Vedi Pottu'?

The song features the talented voices of Thanjai Selvi and Velmurugan, with music composed by Sundar C Babu.

When was 'Vedi Pottu' released?

'Vedi Pottu' was released on November 18, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: 'Vedi Pottu' is an energetic duet that encapsulates the spirit of celebration and joy in the movie Poraali. The lively lyrics by Kabilan and the vibrant music by Sundar C Babu create an infectious atmosphere that invites listeners to dance and rejoice. This song reflects the camaraderie and festive spirit among the characters, making it a highlight of the film. With its upbeat tempo and catchy melody, it evokes feelings of happiness and togetherness.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vedi Pottu from Poraali is a vibrant celebration of life and joy, featuring the dynamic vocals of Thanjai Selvi and Velmurugan. The infectious beats crafted by Sundar C Babu perfectly complement the lively lyrics penned by Kabilan, making it a must-listen for any festive occasion. Dive into this energetic track that promises to uplift your spirits and get you dancing!
stanzaMeanings: Sing with the fire, dance with the beat. Without drinking, come and enjoy. The girl is like a parrot, her eyes shining. Look at the night of the festival...
The fragrance of the flower brings joy, the heart is like a restless breeze. When the little ones smile, it feels like a dream has come true.

Don't say your child is a burden, don't think of it as a shame. Like a mother singing lullabies to her child, trust in the tree that grows strong. Don't let the blood tie you down, sing out loud for our village... (Sing with the fire...)
The eyes are filled with desires, but they won't die easily. What I touch will slip away. Inside, there is no blood left. You are the one who shines like a green gem.
The path leads you forward, come quickly and enjoy...
